chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-985 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 07.10.2025 Mr. Tahir Ali M. A. Rind, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w Muhammad Ali, A.S.P. Ratodero, PDSP Bashir Ahmed Abro and S.I.P. Fida Hussain, S.H.O. P.S. Waris Dino Machi. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner files photographs of an unknown person having injuries on his body and claims to be the corpse of abductee Talib Hussain Bosan under the cover of his statement dated 07.10.2025, taken on record. The police officials, present, file their respective comments alongwith CDR of the alleged abductee and submit that he has been killed during an encounter and is no more in their confinement. Copies whereof are provided to the counsel for the petitioner, who upon receipt of the same, seeks disposal of instant petition; however, submits that the petitioner may be allowed to file appropriate application or avail the remedy in accordance with law. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh as well as Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh have no objection. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
